problem_text_cn:
4-12 (1) 若一个静止地处于平衡状态的物体所受$ N\geqslant 3 $个外力中, 有$ N-1 $个是共点力, 试证这全部$ N $个力是共点力。
(2) 半径$ R $的光滑圆环固定在某竖直平面内, 三边长分别为$ R $, $ \sqrt{3}R $, $ 2R $的匀质三角板放在内环, 静止地处于平衡状态, 如图4-10所示, 试求三角板$ 2R $长边与圆环水平直径间的夹角$ \theta $.
problem_text_en:
4-12 (1) If an object at rest and in equilibrium is subjected to $ N\geqslant 3 $ external forces, and $ N-1 $ of them are concurrent, prove that all $ N $ forces are concurrent.
(2) A smooth circular ring of radius $ R $ is fixed in a vertical plane. A uniform triangular plate with side lengths $ R $, $ \sqrt{3}R $, and $ 2R $ is placed inside the ring, remaining at rest in equilibrium, as shown in Figure 4-10. Find the angle $ \theta $ between the $ 2R $ side of the plate and the horizontal diameter of the ring.
problem_solution_cn:
(1) 物体静止地处于平衡状态, 相对任何一个参考点的角动量都恒为零. 物体所受$ N\geqslant 3 $个外力中, 已有$ N-1 $个力交于一点$ Q $, 那么这$ N-1 $个力中的每一个力相对$ Q $点的力矩都是零. 如果第$ N $个力不过$ Q $点, 它相对$ Q $点力矩便不为零, 与物体角动量恒为零矛盾. 所以此力必过$ Q $点, 即$ N $个力是共点力.
(2) 所给三角板是锐角为$ 30^{\circ} $和$ 60^{\circ} $的直角三角板, $ 2R $长边中点位于环心, 重心在环心与直角顶点连线上, 此连线与$ 2R $长边夹角$ 60^{\circ} $, 与水平直径夹角为$ \theta +60^{\circ} $, 三角板受四个外力, 其中由环施于三个顶点的力都过环心, 因此第四个力即重力也必过环心. 这要求环心与直角顶点连线垂直于水平直径, 即$ \theta +60^{\circ}=90^{\circ} $, 得
$ \theta =30^{\circ} $.
problem_solution_en:
(1) The object is at rest and in equilibrium, so its angular momentum about any reference point is zero. Among the $ N\geqslant 3 $ external forces acting on the object, $ N-1 $ forces intersect at a point $ Q $. Each of these $ N-1 $ forces exerts zero torque about $ Q $. If the $ N $-th force did not pass through $ Q $, it would produce a nonzero torque about $ Q $, contradicting the fact that the object’s angular momentum is zero. Therefore, this force must also pass through $ Q $, i.e., all $ N $ forces are concurrent.
(2) The given triangular plate is a right‑angled triangle with acute angles $ 30^{\circ} $ and $ 60^{\circ} $. The midpoint of the $ 2R $ side lies at the centre of the ring. The centre of mass lies on the line connecting the ring centre and the right‑angle vertex; this line makes an angle of $ 60^{\circ} $ with the $ 2R $ side, and an angle of $ \theta +60^{\circ} $ with the horizontal diameter. The plate is subjected to four external forces; the three forces exerted by the ring at the three vertices all pass through the centre of the ring. Consequently, the fourth force, gravity, must also pass through the centre. This requires that the line connecting the ring centre and the right‑angle vertex be perpendicular to the horizontal diameter, i.e., $ \theta +60^{\circ}=90^{\circ} $, giving
$ \theta =30^{\circ} $.
img_cn: 这是一道大学物理力学题的页面截图。页面顶部是题号4-12，包含两部分：(1)是关于物体在平衡状态下，若N个外力中有N-1个共点，则全部N个力共点的证明题。(2)是关于边长分别为R、√3R、2R的匀质三角板放在半径为R的光滑圆环内，处于平衡状态，求三角板2R长边与圆环水平直径间夹角θ的问题。页面右上角是图4-10，展示了一个圆环内接三角形板的示意图，标注了角度θ。页面下半部分是详细解答，包括对(1)的证明和(2)的求解过程，最终得出θ=30°的结论。页面背景为白色，文字和图示均为黑色，排版清晰。
img_en: This is a screenshot of a university-level physics mechanics problem. The top of the page shows problem number 4-12, which consists of two parts: (1) a proof that if an object in equilibrium is subjected to N external forces, and N-1 of them are concurrent, then all N forces are concurrent. (2) A problem about a uniform triangular plate with side lengths R, √3R, and 2R placed inside a smooth circular ring of radius R, remaining in equilibrium; find the angle θ between the 2R side of the plate and the horizontal diameter of the ring. The upper right corner of the page shows Figure 4-10, a schematic diagram of the triangular plate inscribed in the circular ring, indicating the angle θ. The lower part of the page provides a detailed solution, including the proof for (1) and the solution for (2), concluding that θ = 30°. The background is white, text and diagrams are black, and the layout is clear.
